problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Combining Perovskite crystal structure optimization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
